title: Add VAT Registration and PAYE Registration services under Services menu

requirements.text: Add a 'VAT Registration' entry to the services catalog in `frontend/src/features/services/servicesCatalog.ts` under a new or existing 'compliance' or 'tax' category, with a title, description, price, and relevant feature list covering: mandatory vs voluntary registration, VAT scheme options (Standard, Flat Rate, Cash Accounting), submission to HMRC, VAT number provision, and ongoing support guidance — modelled on competitor offerings at https://360companyformations.co.uk/ and https://www.yourcompanyformations.co.uk/account/.

quotes: add services like VAT registration under the menu "Services"

acceptanceCriteria: A VAT Registration service entry exists in the services catalog with title, description, features list, and price.
The service is categorised under compliance or a dedicated tax category.

requirements.text: Add a 'PAYE Registration' entry to the services catalog in `frontend/src/features/services/servicesCatalog.ts` under the same compliance/tax category, with a title, description, price, and relevant feature list covering: employer PAYE scheme registration with HMRC, employer reference number provision, NI and income tax setup guidance, and payroll compliance notes.

quotes: add PAYE Registration services in the same draft

acceptanceCriteria: A PAYE Registration service entry exists in the services catalog with title, description, features list, and price.
The service is categorised in the same category as VAT Registration.

requirements.text: Create a new dedicated service detail page `frontend/src/pages/services/VATRegistrationServicePage.tsx` for VAT Registration, presenting the service benefits, a clear description of what is included, pricing, and a call-to-action. Follow the same layout pattern used in `RegisteredOfficeServicePage.tsx` and `BusinessSupportServicePage.tsx`.

quotes: add services like VAT registration under the menu "Services"

acceptanceCriteria: A `/services/vat-registration` route exists and renders the VAT Registration page.
The page displays benefits, included features, pricing, and a CTA.
The layout is consistent with other service detail pages.

requirements.text: Create a new dedicated service detail page `frontend/src/pages/services/PAYERegistrationServicePage.tsx` for PAYE Registration, presenting the service benefits, a clear description of what is included, pricing, and a call-to-action. Follow the same layout pattern as other service pages.

quotes: add PAYE Registration services in the same draft

acceptanceCriteria: A `/services/paye-registration` route exists and renders the PAYE Registration page.
The page displays benefits, included features, pricing, and a CTA.
The layout is consistent with other service detail pages.

requirements.text: Register the two new routes `/services/vat-registration` and `/services/paye-registration` in `frontend/src/App.tsx`, pointing to `VATRegistrationServicePage` and `PAYERegistrationServicePage` respectively.

quotes: add services like VAT registration under the menu "Services"
add PAYE Registration services in the same draft

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to `/services/vat-registration` loads the VAT Registration page without a 404.
Navigating to `/services/paye-registration` loads the PAYE Registration page without a 404.

requirements.text: Update the Services dropdown/navigation in `frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayout.tsx` to include links for 'VAT Registration' (pointing to `/services/vat-registration`) and 'PAYE Registration' (pointing to `/services/paye-registration`) alongside existing service links.

quotes: add services like VAT registration under the menu "Services"

acceptanceCriteria: The Services menu/dropdown in the header contains a 'VAT Registration' link.
The Services menu/dropdown in the header contains a 'PAYE Registration' link.
Both links navigate to their respective pages.

requirements.text: Update the services overview page `frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx` to include cards for 'VAT Registration' and 'PAYE Registration', consistent in style with the existing service category cards, each linking to their respective detail pages.

quotes: add services like VAT registration under the menu "Services"
add PAYE Registration services in the same draft

acceptanceCriteria: The Services overview page displays a card for VAT Registration linking to `/services/vat-registration`.
The Services overview page displays a card for PAYE Registration linking to `/services/paye-registration`.
Cards match the visual style of existing service cards.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
Do not alter existing service pages or catalog entries — only add new entries.
Follow the existing page layout patterns established in RegisteredOfficeServicePage.tsx and BusinessSupportServicePage.tsx.
nonGoals: Backend integration or order submission for VAT/PAYE registration services.
Online payment processing for these services.
Changes to the company formation wizard.
